arts.ttl: Strasbourg predicted XI v Lens: Ismaël Doukouré out
arts.sum: Ismaël Doukouré will miss RC Strasbourg Alsace’s visit to face RC Lens on Sunday. The Frenchman is absent due to suspension. Strasbourg, despite the absence of Doukouré, a key man…

arts.ttl: Kevin Danso sends Tottenham dressing room message after triple Man Utd injury boost
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM vs MANCHESTER UNITED: Kevin Danso has already played two games for Spurs since his arrival from Lens but he is yet to taste victory following successive cup defeats to Liverpool and Aston Villa, respectively

arts.ttl: Preview: Lens vs. Strasbourg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Lens and Strasbourg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: 5 reasons Borussia Dortmund will still finish in the top four
arts.sum: With Niko Kovač's tactical magic, Serhou Guirassy's goals and the weight of history behind them, bundesliga.com makes the case for an end-of-season resurgence from the Black-Yellows... New Dortmund coach Niko Kovač (r.) previously won a Bundesliga and DFB Cup double in charge of Bayern Munich.
